name: capacitor-stripe-terminal
description: Stripe Terminal Tap to Pay for Capacitor iOS

scripts.build: npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs
scripts.build:esm: tsc --module es2015 --target es2017 --outDir dist/esm --declaration --declarationDir dist/esm src/index.ts src/definitions.ts src/web.ts
scripts.build:cjs: tsc --module commonjs --target es2017 --outDir dist src/index.ts src/definitions.ts src/web.ts && mv dist/index.js dist/plugin.cjs.js
